text: in the search results: display aim title first, then path afterwards (smaller font)

status.comment: Render order and styling already match the spec.

reflection: Verified current implementation in AimSearchPicker.vue: Template (result-text): - {{ item.data.text }} first - Then {{ item.pathContext }} (the parent path built recursively) CSS: .aim-path { color: #8c8c8c; font-size: 0.78rem; line-height: 1.2; } getAimPathContext builds 'Parent / Grandparent' (limited length) and attaches as pathContext for search results. This exactly fulfills: 'display aim title first, then path afterwards (smaller font)' No code change needed; status was lagging the implementation. (Part of July phase open aims cleanup.) Evidence: direct code read of the component + CSS; matches aim text 1:1. Related parent 'aim search'.
